calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion And Motion To Hear The Petition For Order Of Affirmation In Application For Italian Dual Citizenship
Off Calendar Apr-04-2023 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances (by Zoom):
Larsen Ensberg, Esq. 626-813-3744 for Petitioner Alvan Sargent et al who is also present via zoom.
No other Appearance.

RULING - The matter is not contested. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PETITIONER ROSEANN BURHENNE, ALVAN SARGENT's Motion To Hear The Petition For Order Of Affirmation In Application For Italian Dual Citizenship.

Petitioners' unopposed "petition for order of affirmation in application for Italian dual citizenship" is granted.

Order is signed.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr., Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/RBU)
